controls.title: Lawful Basis for Processing
controls.description: Personal data must only be processed under one of the six lawful bases: consent, contract, legal obligation, vital interests, public task, or legitimate interests.

controls.title: Data Subject Rights
controls.description: Data subjects have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict, and port their personal data. Requests must be fulfilled within 30 days.

controls.title: DPO Appointment
controls.description: Organisations processing personal data at scale must appoint a Data Protection Officer (DPO). The DPO must be registered with the NDPC.

controls.title: Cross-Border Data Transfers
controls.description: Personal data may only be transferred to a foreign country that provides adequate data protection, or under approved safeguards (SCCs, BCRs, consent).

controls.title: Data Breach Notification
controls.description: Breaches likely to result in risk to data subjects must be reported to the NDPC within 72 hours of discovery. Affected data subjects must also be notified.

controls.title: Compliance Audit Return (CAR)
controls.description: All data controllers and processors must submit an annual Compliance Audit Return (CAR) to the NDPC by May 30 each year.
